{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The section nominates Corbett et al. (2012) as the strongest published baseline, but contradicts itself by listing systems with lower latency.",
    "R1.7": "Citations are missing for production systems like CockroachDB and YugabyteDB.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty is not explicitly disclosed in the section; it assumes accuracy of its own numbers without verification.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, as it includes unrelated issues with citations and uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors (inaccurate framing of Corbett et al.) and fabrications (unsubstantiated rhetoric).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason; the section lacks transparency about its mechanisms."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The section nominates Corbett et al. (2012) as the strongest published baseline, but contradicts itself by listing systems with lower latency.
rationale.R1.7: Citations are missing for production systems like CockroachDB and YugabyteDB.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is not explicitly disclosed in the section; it assumes accuracy of its own numbers without verification.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, as it includes unrelated issues with citations and uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors (inaccurate framing of Corbett et al.) and fabrications (unsubstantiated rhetoric).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason; the section lacks transparency about its mechanisms.
